title: Tevlaphee Windscreen Cover, Windscreen Frost Protector, Car Windshield Cover, Magnetic, Against Snow, Ice, Frost, Dust, Sun, Foldable, 197 * 128cm
features: ❄【UPGRADED MATERIAL】Our car windscreen cover have four layer which contains PEVA aluminum foil, spunlaced cotton, composite cotton, black nonwoven lining material, which are resistant to high temperatures and tears, and can be better kept warm, snow proof and anti-freeze.

❄【STASBLE WINDSCREEN COVER】3 pcs updated magnet (15mm * 6mm) holds strongly on the windshield, no scratches arise in any case because the magnets are covered with cloth; side Wings pinched in the doors, theft protection; Rubber bands on the side mirrors; These 3 Design to keep the windscreen stable on the car, even strong windy.

❄【WIND AND SNOW PROTECTION】Aluminum foil and cotton padding can effectively prevent heat and water and wind and snow, help you prevent snow in front of the window,eliminating the need to defrost your window every morning,effectively reduces fuel expense,keep the windshield Clean & Clear,help blocking the car wiper area from filling with leaves and pine needles.

❄【EASY TO CARRY】 The Windscreen Cover is soft and foldable, easy to install and easy to use. When you don't need to use it, it can be easily folded and placed in the corner of the car, which is very convenient and saves space.Upgrade your driving experience with this must-have winter car accessory. Order now!

❄【UNIVERSAL SIZE FOR MOST CARS】 Universal Size for Most Car's Windshield, The expanded size 77.6 * 61.8 *50.4 in (197*157*128 CM) in fits for most vehicles. Note: It does not fit on rear windows! *If you have any problems or questions, please don't hesitate to contact us. We will give our best service for you.
description: Product Description TEVLAPHEE WINDSCREEN SNOW COVER TIRED OF BATTLING SNOW AND ICE ON CHILLY MORNINGS? Tevlaphee windscreen cover protects your vehicle from snow/ice/frost, save your time and efforts in winter morning, avoid scraper risk on the windscreen. Previous page YOU NEED TEVLAPHEE WINDSCREEN COVER TO SOLVE THESE PROBLEMS! Package Includes: 1 x Car Windscreen Cover 1 x Storage Bag 1 x Product Manual Our Windscreen Cover is crafted from premium 4 layers material, ensuring exceptional durability and weather resistance. Its robust design withstands harsh winter conditions. The secure flaps tuck into your car doors, providing both anti-theft protection and wind resistance. The waterproof design prevents moisture from seeping through, ensuring no freezing occurs underneath. This ensures a clear view and hassle-free mornings, even in the coldest winter weather. Next page EASY TO USE No more freezing hands from scraping! Simply lift the cover off in seconds to reveal a clear windscreen, free from frost and snow. Making your mornings quick and stress-free, and enjoy winter without the hassle! The three built-in magnets further enhance the stability. Note: These magnets are sewn on the inside, it will not scratch your car. The extended design of the cover also protect the windscreen wipers, and prolonging their lifespan. The windproof strap is hung on the car's side mirrors to provide wind resistance. Ensuring it stays securely in place during use. Our cover showcases excellent workmanship with reinforced stitching and durable seams, ensuring long-lasting performance. The front of windscreen cover is smooth, simply wipe it down, and it’s spotless! Easy to fold, saving space in your vehicle. Previous page Secure the flaps with the door closed. Hang both of the elastic bands on wing mirrors. Completed. With its ultra-thick design, it also can be used as picnic blanket, yoga mats, tent mattress, pet car mats, and baby crawling mat at the outdoors.
